name: traceSetEventColors
title: traceSetEventColors
syntax: long traceSetEventColors(message msg, dword font, dword bkgnd)
description: Sets the text and background color for displaying msg in the Trace Window. The makeRGB function can be used for the colors.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: Variable type: message, errorFrame, pg, linFrame, mostRawMessage, mostMessage, mostAmsMessage, frFrame, frError, frameError, nullFrame, pdu, pocState, slot, symbol, startCycle
